      <frame id="1:50" name="Group 1171281699" x="678" y="1.44000244140625" width="623" height="249">
        <text id="1:51" name="Bodhi is built on a simple idea. Yoga is not a workout, a wellness trend, or a credential. It is a steady, repeatable practice that, over time, returns you to yourself." x="678" y="1.44000244140625" width="623" height="87" />
        <text id="1:52" name="We teach in the lineage of classical hatha and ashtanga, with grounding in the Yoga Sūtras of Patañjali and the Haṭha Pradīpikā. Our teachers come from working practice — not just certification — and our students leave with a discipline they can carry into a class, a clinic, or a quiet morning at home." x="678" y="105.44000244140625" width="623" height="145" />
      </frame>
